# Release v0.11.2

Released: 2026-02-25

## Changes Since v0.11.1

**Version Bump:** PATCH

### Changes

- test(polkadot-docs): add create account guide verification (#175) (6d422b5)
- feat: replace Hardhat node with pallet-revive dev node (#164) (78bd74b)
- fix(ci): add libclang-dev to integration test workflow (#174) (4b8ee9d)
- fix(ci): update sync script for renamed chain_spec_builder key (#173) (e65f540)
- fix(ci): handle unsearchable authors in PR guidance workflow (#171) (32aac3a)


## Compatibility

This release was tested with:
- Rust: 1.91.1
- Node.js: v20.20.0

## Testing

All recipes have passed CI tests.
